hero.headline: Software for camper rental operations
hero.subheadline: CamperFlow connects your bookings to your operations — vehicle readiness, digital checklists, compliance tracking, and guest handovers — so nothing falls through the gap between booking confirmed and keys handed over.
hero.clarification: Not a booking platform. CamperFlow runs alongside your reservation system and handles everything it doesn't: the full operational layer from booking confirmed to vehicle returned.
hero.trust: Built by Kevin Marry — former operator of Epic Vans

problem.headline: Running a rental fleet is operationally complex
problem.intro: Booking systems handle reservations. But they don't track whether a vehicle is ready, compliant, or fit to hand over.
problem.item0Desc: Most operators still use spreadsheets to track vehicle readiness, compliance, and handover status — creating gaps, duplication, and missed checks.
problem.item1Desc: Vehicle status, open issues, and compliance records are scattered across emails, WhatsApp, notes, and multiple tools.
problem.item2Desc: Without a structured system, important checks get missed. Warranty conditions, roadworthiness, and regulatory requirements fall through the cracks.
problem.item3Desc: Handover processes are manual, inconsistent, and time-consuming — creating friction for guests and pressure on staff.

lifecycle.headline: From confirmed booking to road-ready
lifecycle.subheadline: CamperFlow orchestrates every stage of the rental cycle — with nothing falling through the cracks.
lifecycle.step0Desc: Booking arrives from your existing platform
lifecycle.step4Desc: Guest receives QR link to their trip guide
lifecycle.step6Desc: Return inspection complete, vehicle ready again

features.headline: One operational system for your entire fleet
features.subheadline: From the moment a booking is confirmed to the vehicle being returned and reset — CamperFlow runs the operational layer.
features.tab0Desc: See every upcoming rental in one view. Track which vehicles are assigned, their readiness status, and what actions need to happen before handover.
features.tab0Detail: Connect your existing booking platform and get a unified view of all upcoming reservations alongside vehicle readiness and open tasks.
features.tab1Desc: Every vehicle has a live readiness status. Know at a glance what's ready, what needs attention, and what's blocked before each rental starts.
features.tab1Detail: Track readiness across your entire fleet — from service schedules and compliance dates to open issues and pre-rental checks.
features.tab2Desc: Replace paper checklists with structured digital workflows for handover, return, and deep cleans. Every step is logged and timestamped.
features.tab2Detail: Build custom checklist templates for any workflow. Assign them to staff, track completion, and keep a full audit trail for every rental.
features.tab3Desc: Log and track vehicle defects, damage, and maintenance needs from the field. Link issues to rentals and monitor resolution.
features.tab3Detail: Staff can report issues on the spot. Every issue is tracked from discovery to resolution — linked to the vehicle, rental, and responsible person.
features.tab4Desc: Track service intervals, warranty conditions, roadworthiness certificates, and regulatory checks. Get alerts before deadlines — not after.
features.tab4Detail: Never miss a compliance deadline. CamperFlow monitors service intervals, safety certificates, and warranty conditions for every vehicle in your fleet.
features.tab5Desc: Every rental generates a branded guest page — vehicle guide, emergency contacts, return instructions — accessible via QR code. No app download. Multilingual.
features.tab5Detail: Guests scan a QR code before pickup and get everything they need for their trip. You control the content and branding. Supports multiple languages, updated in real time.

founder.headline: Built by someone who ran the operation
founder.body1: At Epic Vans, I managed the fleet day-to-day — vehicle prep, compliance deadlines, staff checklists, guest handovers. The booking system handled reservations. Everything else lived in spreadsheets, WhatsApp threads, and institutional memory.
founder.body2: CamperFlow is what I needed and couldn't find: not generic software with rental add-ons, but a system built specifically around how a rental operation actually works — from booking confirmed to vehicle returned.
founder.name: Kevin Marry
founder.role: Founder, CamperFlow — former operator of Epic Vans

pricing.headline: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subheadline: Start small, scale as your fleet grows. All plans include the full operational layer.
pricing.extrasNote: Extra vehicles from €7/mo · Extra staff from €3/mo · Scale within your plan, then upgrade to the next tier

operations.heroHeadline: Know what needs attention today — before it becomes a problem at handover.
operations.heroSubheadline: CamperFlow gives you a live view of every upcoming rental: vehicle readiness, outstanding tasks, compliance blockers, and automated reminders — all in one place your team can act on.
operations.heroTrust: No need to replace your booking system. Staff can use any phone, tablet, or laptop.
operations.dashboardHeadline: Every vehicle, every booking, every open task. One view.
operations.dashboardBody: The operations dashboard is the control layer your booking system never built. Upcoming pickups, vehicle readiness, compliance deadlines, and outstanding actions — all surfaced in one view so nothing slips through before keys change hands.
operations.stat0Label: of fleet status visible in one view
operations.stat2Label: readiness and task status across all vehicles
operations.workflowHeadline: What needs to happen today — surfaced, not buried.
operations.workflowBody: CamperFlow tells your team what to do next. No digging through emails or WhatsApp threads — just the current status of every active and upcoming rental, with the actions that still need to happen before keys change hands.
operations.remindersDesc: Guests and staff are notified at every critical moment — pre-pickup confirmations, return reminders, and outstanding task alerts. No one has to remember to send them.
operations.readinessDesc: See the live readiness status of every vehicle in your fleet. Know what's prepped, what's pending, and what's blocked — before it becomes a problem at pickup.
operations.featuresHeadline: Reminders sent. Readiness tracked. Nothing missed.
operations.outcome0Desc: See every upcoming rental with vehicle status and outstanding actions — before it becomes a last-minute scramble at handover.
operations.outcome1Desc: Compliance gaps, unresolved issues, and vehicles not cleared for rental are flagged automatically — before they cause problems at pickup.
operations.outcome2Desc: Reminders go out automatically. Staff see what needs doing without being chased. The operational layer runs so you don't have to manage it manually.
operations.consistencyHeadline: The system runs the coordination so your team runs the operation.

checklists.heroHeadline: Every staff member follows the same process. Every time.
checklists.heroSubheadline: CamperFlow guides staff through pickup, return, and deep clean — with mandatory steps, photo capture, and timestamped sign-off. The process doesn't depend on who's working that day.
checklists.heroTrust: Works on any phone or tablet. No app download required.
checklists.proofHeadline: A guided process staff can't skip.
checklists.proofBody: Each booking automatically has pickup and return checklists assigned. Staff open CamperFlow on their phone and work through every step in order — required items, photos, notes. Nothing closes until everything is done.
checklists.stat0Label: of required steps enforced before sign-off
checklists.stat2Label: attached per step, linked to vehicle and booking
checklists.workflowHeadline: Each rental triggers its own checklist. Staff don't decide what to check.
checklists.workflowBody: Pickup and return checklists are attached to every booking. When a staff member opens a booking, the checklist is already there. The same structured process runs for every vehicle and every handover — regardless of who's working.
checklists.evidenceHeadline: Every inspection leaves a permanent record.
checklists.evidenceBody: Photos, notes, and completion status are stored against the vehicle and booking — not in someone's camera roll or a paper file. If a damage dispute arises after return, the timestamped evidence is already on record.
checklists.evidenceCard0Desc: Faults, defects, and damage reported on the spot — linked to the vehicle, the rental, and the staff member who logged it. Timestamped and permanently stored.
checklists.evidenceCard1Desc: When a checklist is signed off, the vehicle status updates automatically — showing exactly which checks passed, what was flagged, and whether it cleared for the next rental.
checklists.consistencyHeadline: The same process runs for every vehicle, every handover.
checklists.item0Desc: You build the checklist once. Every staff member follows that exact template — on every vehicle, for every rental. No one improvises or abbreviates.
checklists.item1Desc: Mark a step as mandatory and staff must complete it before the checklist closes. No workarounds, no unchecked boxes, no assumptions.
checklists.item2Desc: Every completed checklist is permanently stored — who did it, when, what was checked, what was flagged. Reviewable at any point, linked to the vehicle and booking.
checklists.step0Desc: When a booking is confirmed, pickup and return checklists are automatically assigned to the vehicle. Staff open CamperFlow and see exactly what needs checking — no verbal handoff, no guessing.
checklists.step1Desc: Check off items in order, attach photos from the camera, add notes. Required steps can't be skipped — every item is acknowledged before the checklist can be completed.
checklists.step2Desc: On completion, the checklist is signed off and locked — timestamped, linked to the vehicle, booking, and staff member. Reviewable any time. If a dispute arises, the evidence is already there.

cta.headline: See CamperFlow in action
cta.body: Book a 30-minute demo. We'll walk through your fleet, your current process, and show you exactly how CamperFlow fits your operation.
cta.note: No commitment. No pitch deck. Just a real look at the product.
